messages.subject: [R-SIG-Win] Rtools45 update
messages.body_plain:
Dear R Windows developers,

an update of Rtools45, the toolchain for R for Windows used by R-devel 
and R 4.5, is available as revision 6768 from

https://cran.r-project.org/bin/windows/Rtools/rtools45/rtools.html

Package muparser has been added? and muparser support has been enabled 
in gdal (thanks to Chris Toney).

Some additional packages have been upgraded.? See

https://cran.r-project.org/bin/windows/Rtools/rtools45/news.html

for more details.

Best
Tomas
